meta.title: What went wrong with the F-35?
meta.description:
The F-35 Joint Strike Fighter may be the most capable tactical fighter aircraft of all time, but it's also the most expensive. Here's why.

📰  Articles Cited
What went wrong? How the F-35 got to be so expensive
➡️  https://sbxx.us/3ymF8ar
F-35 pilot responds to claims that the jet is a failure 
➡️ https://sbxx.us/3DpYEGE
